creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Krstulja from comment #1)
> Thanks for the patch, but you just duplicated the existing master site?
> Also, portrevision bump is not needed for this. Could you fix please and
> obsolete the current patch when you upload the new one?

Ugh! Sorry, Vladimir.

Fixed! :)

Thanks!

--Chris
